CONTENT.Club career: Having passed through the ranks of the GNK Dinamo Zagreb youth academy, Bočkaj spent his first two professional seasons with NK Inter Zaprešić and NK Lokomotiva in the Croatian First Football League. In June 2017, he transferred to NK Osijek, together with his teammate Eros Grezda.
CONTENT.External links: Petar Bočkaj at SoccerwayPetar Bočkaj at the Croatian Football FederationPetar Bočkaj at Croatian Football Statistics  (archived) (in Croatian)
CONTENT.International career: On 23 March 2017, Bočkaj made his debut for Croatia U21 in a friendly match against Slovenia.

SUMMARY: Petar Bočkaj (born 23 July 1996) is a Croatian footballer who plays as a left-back or winger for Dinamo Zagreb.
